description: Two bay horses gallop side by side across a green turf racecourse, their legs fully extended in racing stride. The leading horse on the left is ridden by a jockey in yellow and white, while the trailing horse on the right carries a rider in grey. A large brick building stands at the left edge, and a smaller white structure is visible in the distance at right. The sky is overcast with dramatic clouds. The scene captures the peak of competitive racing.
